spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs. Use p-8 or p-12 for containers.
spacing_and_layout.grid_marketing: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetry, Visual Tension, Art. Wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12).
spacing_and_layout.grid_dashboard: Mode B: The Control Room Grid. Density, Data Correlation, Scanability. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Use h-full.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Mobile-First. Left-align dense content. Never center by default.

surfaces.marketing: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton. border-r border-b border-border/40. No soft shadows. Sharp edges.
surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow. Hover: slight lift and subtle shadow.
surfaces.headers: Crystal Glass: bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px delicate inner stroke (border-black/5).

components.buttons: Sharp corners or very subtle radius (rounded-sm). High contrast hover states.
components.forms: Shadcn components heavily customized. Never use native inputs.
components.tables: Dense, functional, 1px borders, hover states on rows for scanability.

motion.general: Minimalist micro-interactions for feedback. Hover state lift on cards (-translate-y-1).
motion.transitions: Use specific properties (transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease).

icons.style: Use regular or duotone weights for dashboards and detailed UI.

images.description: Wide-angle photograph of a modern glass office building at golden hour, warm sunlight reflecting off windows, deep navy sky in background, shot from below looking up, cinematic depth of field, professional corporate feel
Minimalist abstract architectural background, soft light reflecting on clean white and light grey geometric planes, smooth transitions, subtle depth, high-end real estate concept
Elegant minimalist pattern of interconnected nodes and lines in deep navy blue on a stark white background, representing networking and channel partnerships, soft studio lighting

instructions_to_main_agent: Execute 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react' to use Phosphor icons.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for marketing/hero sections, creating asymmetrical bento grids.
Use Shadcn/UI heavily for the dashboard (cards, tables, dialogs, dropdowns, calendars).
Replace generic Shadcn radiuses (default 0.5rem) with crisp 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm' for a technical Swiss look.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='login-button').
Never use generic fonts like Inter for headings. Implement 'Cabinet Grotesk' for Headings and 'Manrope' for body.
Apply Grid Borders to data-heavy dashboard sections (border-r border-b).
Avoid fully transparent headers over images; use Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70).
